tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_liveblocks_rest_storage_reflects_submission
tests.trace:
start_app = None

    def test_liveblocks_rest_storage_reflects_submission(start_app):
        secret = os.environ["LIVEBLOCKS_SECRET_KEY"]
    
        # Allow some time for the storage write to be flushed to Liveblocks servers.
        url = f"https://api.liveblocks.io/v2/rooms/{ROOM_ID}/storage?format=json"
        deadline = time.time() + 60
        last_body = None
        last_status = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            resp = requests.get(
                url,
                headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {secret}"},
                timeout=15,
            )
            last_status = resp.status_code
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                try:
                    body = resp.json()
                except ValueError:
                    body = None
                last_body = body
                form_node = (body or {}).get("data", {}).get("form")
                if form_node and form_node.get("data"):
                    data = form_node["data"]
                    if (
                        data.get("name") == NAME_VALUE
                        and data.get("email") == EMAIL_VALUE
                        and data.get("message") == MESSAGE_VALUE
                        and data.get("submitted") is True
                    ):
                        assert form_node.get("liveType") == "LiveObject", (
                            f"Expected storage.form to be a LiveObject, got: {form_node.get('liveType')}"
                        )
                        return
            time.sleep(2)
    
>       raise AssertionError(
            "Liveblocks v2 REST storage did not reflect the expected submitted form data within the timeout. "
            f"Last HTTP status: {last_status}; last body: {json.dumps(last_body)[:2000] if last_body else last_body!r}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Liveblocks v2 REST storage did not reflect the expected submitted form data within the timeout. Last HTTP status: 200; last body: '{"form": {"name": "Alice Example", "email": "alice+zr-m76yjto@example.com", "message": "Hello from run zr-m76yjto", "submitted": true}}'
